narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 4-A (precinct in Huron County) has 524 registered voters, with 69.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.1 percentage points.
